# Emanuel Flury - Agentic AI & Business Automation Consultant

> Independent consultant specializing in agentic AI, business automation, and intelligent process transformation. Based in Switzerland with 13+ years Fortune 500 automation leadership experience. Clients achieve 5x-10x ROI, 70%+ time savings, and 99.5% accuracy rates.

## About

Emanuel Flury is an independent consultant helping businesses transform operations through intelligent automation, AI agents, and process optimization. Previously led automation initiatives at Johnson & Johnson (2012-2024), achieving 99.5% accuracy, 70%+ time savings, and 30% reduction in fulfillment time. Also founded Taxed GmbH (2021) for Swiss fiduciary services.

## Consulting Services

### Agentic AI Consulting
Agentic AI represents the next evolution of AI - autonomous systems that plan, reason, and execute multi-step workflows independently. With 40% of enterprise applications embedding AI agents by 2026 (Gartner), businesses moving now gain significant competitive advantage.
- Multi-Agent System Architecture
- LLM Orchestration (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, Claude Agent SDK)
- Model Context Protocol (MCP) Integration
- Human-in-the-Loop Design
- Production-Ready Deployment

### Business Automation Consulting
Transform enterprise operations with intelligent automation delivering measurable results. The RPA market is growing to $247 billion by 2035 with average 240% ROI.
- Process Discovery & Analysis
- RPA Implementation (UiPath Certified)
- Intelligent Document Processing (99%+ accuracy)
- Enterprise System Integration (SAP, Oracle, Salesforce)
- Governance & Compliance Frameworks

### AI-Powered Workflow Design
RAG powers over 60% of production AI applications. Design intelligent workflows using vector databases, hybrid search strategies, and LLM orchestration.
- RAG Architecture Design
- Vector Database Strategy (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Chroma)
- Intelligent Document Processing
- Enterprise Semantic Search
- LLM-Agnostic Architecture

### Digital Transformation Strategy
While 90% of enterprises launch digital initiatives, only 30% achieve sustained impact (McKinsey). The difference lies in combining AI, data strategy, and execution discipline.
- Process Discovery & Assessment
- Automation Roadmap Development
- ROI Analysis & Business Case
- Change Management Planning
- Center of Excellence Design

## Credentials & Certifications

- UiPath RPA Developer (2022)

- Master of Arts in Economics-Finance, University of Aberdeen

- 13+ years automation & AI consulting experience
- Fortune 500 automation leadership (Johnson & Johnson 2012-2024)
- 99.5% system accuracy delivered
- 70% average time reduction achieved
- Expert in agentic AI, LLM orchestration, and vector databases
